name: local-tool-bundles-mcp
description: Repo-local MCP plugin that exposes claude-mem and codebase-memory tool bundles through local stdio servers.

interface.shortDescription: Local MCP wrappers for your imported tool bundles.
interface.longDescription: Exposes the repo-local claude-mem, codebase-memory, and codebase-memory-mcp descriptor bundles as usable Codex MCP servers backed by a heuristic local runtime.
defaultPrompt: Trace callers of a function locally.
